postToolUse.bash: command -v shale >/dev/null 2>&1 && shale capture copilot || true
postToolUse.powershell: if (Get-Command shale -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { shale capture copilot }

sessionEnd.bash: command -v shale >/dev/null 2>&1 && shale capture copilot || true
sessionEnd.powershell: if (Get-Command shale -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { shale capture copilot }

sessionStart.bash: command -v shale >/dev/null 2>&1 && shale capture copilot || true
sessionStart.powershell: if (Get-Command shale -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { shale capture copilot }

userPromptSubmitted.bash: command -v shale >/dev/null 2>&1 && shale capture copilot || true
userPromptSubmitted.powershell: if (Get-Command shale -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { shale capture copilot }
